item.name: Get BC User Registration by ID
Messages (Notifications)
item.description: Message staging — single source of truth for all notifications. Auto-created on Sales Order and Delivery Order creation, and synced to Business Central.

request.description: Get all messages. Optional query params: ?partnerNo=CUST001 or ?threadId=TH-001

item.name: Get All Messages by Partner No
Get All Messages by Thread ID

body.raw:
{
  "threadId": "TH-001",
  "documentType": "Message",
  "category": "General",
  "linkedDocType": "Sales Order",
  "linkedDocNo": "SO000123",
  "senderType": "Partner",
  "senderId": "{{partner_no}}",
  "senderName": "ACME Trading LLC",
  "messageText": "Please confirm shipment date.",
  "changeDetails": "",
  "messageTimestamp": "2026-05-03T18:33:23.437Z",
  "direction": "Portal-to-BC",
  "status": "Sent"
}

request.description: Creates message in local DB and syncs to BC POST .../messages. documentType: Message | Return Request | Amendment Request | Concern. category: General | Pricing Dispute | Quality Issue | Delivery Concern | Invoice Dispute | Return Request | Amendment Request | Credit Request. direction: Portal-to-BC | BC-to-Portal. status: Sent | Delivered | Read | Open | In Progress | Resolved | Closed | Escalated
Inbound from Business Central. Uses x-register-token header instead of Bearer token.
Allowed: Sent | Delivered | Read | Open | In Progress | Resolved | Closed | Escalated
